features: Feedback admin dashboard: Mark Resolved / Reopen workflow with resolution note + fixed-in-version inputs; per-row green Resolve / outline Reopen buttons; new Status column with green Resolved / yellow Open badges; load_feedback_log schema extended to 4 new resolution fields

critical.issue: Save Exercise 2a (Ecosystem Services) threw 'An error occurred saving Exercise 2a' for valid input after v1.13.0 deploy
critical.impact: User-reported via in-app feedback within hours of v1.13.0 deploy; ES save flow blocked despite N:M widget rendering correctly
critical.resolution: Added missing source('functions/matrix_from_linked.R') line before isa_form_builders.R source. serialize_linked() was undefined at runtime because every test sourced matrix_from_linked.R directly while the production app did not. Test coverage didn't catch the integration gap. Verified end-to-end via Playwright same day.

migration_notes: Pre-existing feedback log entries (no resolution_status field) display as 'Open' by default — no data migration required.

Process lesson: when adding a new R file under functions/, the corresponding source() line in global.R MUST be added in the same change. Tests that source the file directly hide this gap. CI check would help — list functions/*.R and assert each is sourced.
